form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when sixth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Best figures puts him right in this and well worth another chance.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 4 lengths (35.98) over 642m at Q Lakeside. Recorded the quickest time on the card last time. Stay with her.
